title: Tactile perceptions of digital textiles
summary: This paper looks at tactile perceptions of digital textiles and is useful as a reference for quantitative touch research. At the moment it seems most useful as a methodological reference rather than a central conceptual paper.

related.reason: Both deal with tactile evaluation and textile touch.

notes: This entry should be expanded after rereading. For now its main value is as a quantitative reference point in the literature.
quotes: Good reference for quantitative research on touch.
